entry.title: Error when creating Production Order

Hello Community,


When creating purchase order , system is generating this error " No matching records found 'Warehouses' (OWHS) (ODBC -2028) [Message 131-183]"

Any idea about this ?

entry.title: Re: No data being read from SAP Gateway Demo Server - ES5...
entry.content: I do... I entered the correct credentials... but it still keeps giving me the same error...

entry.title: Deprecated domains and Data elements - Pre conversion project
entry.content:
Hi SAP team, 

we need guidance on below issue:

Context:

Ford is doing a S/4HANA conversion for ECC to S/4HANA. We have N and N 1 Landscape in Ford. 

N is for current Business As Usual landscape.

N 1 Landscape is being created for S/4HANA where system copies from N will be copied in N 1 and SUM tool will be executed.

Issue:

Option 1: In N 1 DEV conversion - we will come across a stage in Uptime phase of SUM - ACT_UPG where we will remediate deprecated domains and data elements with custom domains and data elements. These will be captured in a TR in N 1 DEV. This TR will be imported in N landscape and will be tested and moved to Production ( In N Landscape)

Option 2: In N 1 DEV conversion - we will come across a stage in Uptime phase of SUM - ACT_UPG where we will remediate deprecated domains and data elements with custom domains and data elements. These will be captured in a TR in N 1 DEV. This TR will NOT move in N Landscape and will go in N 1 QA, N 1 TEST and finally in PROD.

Option 3: Make changes directly in PROD uptime phase.

Question:

When we will do Upgrade/conversion for Production will we get an option to import the TR that we created in N 1 DEV in Production conversion in Uptime phase ? Will it pose any problems if we go ahead with Option 2 as above ?

what will be best strategy for this considering all above 3 options.

entry.title: Re: Anyone who have encountered the configuration of CRT...
entry.content:
Check V_T549Z for  your Custom Cumulator and Years 2025 and 2026.

For each Modif./Param. in Year 2025, the first X Payroll Periods should be associated with Cumulation Year 2025, while the last Y Payroll Periods should be associated with Cumulation Year 2026.

Check the configuration of the past years (such as 2022 or 2023) to confirm.

If that solves your problem, make a note to modify this table each year during the Payroll Calendars generation process.

entry.title: Re: FCC not working properly failing with generating empt...
entry.content: The source file structure changes worked fine.

entry.title: Re: Retraining Assignments / Self registration
entry.content: @MarleneD, thank you. It's better to understand it now. The following configurations can be reviewed, as they could assist you with your scenario: Creating a Substitute Course Relationship (KBA 2177797) | Preventing Learners from Over-Enrolling (KBA 2340762).

entry.title: Mexico payables with two currencies in XK03
entry.content:
From a vendor master and payment perspective, how does having two bank accounts with a single supplier affect when issuing a payment in F110 and comunicating with the bank?

What setup does SAP need to know when to pay USD in local Fx currency to a MXN bank account VS paying USD to same currency bank destination?

I am working on the multicurrency for Mexico payables, but need more information on this from a fundational standpoint for SAP configuration and testing before moving into PROD or ECP.

2. Show company logo

3. Show other graphics

4. Show colored texts

Appreciate your expert advice and guidance.

Thank you and best regards,

Elaine

Thanks for the valuable help.

entry.title: Re: Hybrid landscape with RISE

Hello,

 

The scenario you described is not possible in RISE. I recommend contacting your customer's account executive to discuss this option.

RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, tailored option, customer data center option

 

Regards,

Jose M.

entry.title: Re: SoapFault:faultstring=Error reading XMLStreamReader: Unexpected character
entry.content: The payload is incorrect because the first character of the prolog would be '<' which is denoted in the error, and given what is visible my guess would be an encoding issue of some sort.

entry.title: Re: Fiori App to PFCG Role Mapping
entry.content: @greg , Is this still the best option to pull a report with list of Fiori apps and associated App IDs? or do we have any out of the box solution offered by SAP?

entry.title: P.O. vendor sells by weight but tracked by each in SAP.
entry.content: What is the best way to manage when vendor sells by weight but we inventory by the each. How do we modify the PREQ/PO to allow for receiving when the weight is constantly changing?

entry.title: SAP Reference Architecture Framework (SEAF) & RBA
entry.content:
I'm looking for a way to stay updated with the evolving SAP Reference Business Architecture (RBA)? 

Knowing how to contact those at SAP responsible for creating and updating the RBA would be incredibly helpful. I already have a solid understanding of the SEAF methodology and its application. For those interested, you can gain a good understanding through the methodology guide and its application via the learning path applying the SEAF.

My challenge is staying informed about changes to the content of process and capability decompositions and their relationships. The entities and relationships are illustrated in this diagram.

An older "published" version of the content is available via Signavio Process Explorer.

I mention "older version" because our instance of LeanIX has access to the RBA as a reference catalogue, which has many updates over what I see on Signavio Process Explorer. For example, the LeanIX capability catalogue shows that "Global Trade Management" has been renamed to "International Trade Management" and the three business capabilities under the original name are now deprecated and replaced with seven other business capabilities:

Originally:

  • Global Trade Management
    • Export Management and Control
    • Import Management and Control
    • Preference Management

An example of the three deprecated items has an exclamation with the note "Export Management and Control is linked to an outdated version of the business capability from the catalog."

The catalog now has:

  • International Trade Management
    • Export Management
    • Import Management
    • Intrastat Declaration Management
    • Sanctioned Party Screening
    • Trade Compliance Management
    • Trade Preference Management
    • Trade Product Classification Management

As per the entities and relationships diagram, there should be related Business Activities in the RBA. There may even be updates to business process segments as well!  What I'm looking for is a way to access the very latest RBA (process model, capability model, relationships between). It is not helpful to only have access to the updated capability model. 

The issue is that we also use SAP Signavio, which is integrated with our SAP LeanIX. We have imported the latest RBA sgx into our Signavio dev environment, but it is not up to date with what we see in LeanIX. I have exported all the dictionary derivatives to deeply analyse the data contained. I realize that Signavio and LeanIX are recent acquisitions for SAP and things will likely get sorted over time, but in the meantime, I really could use access to the full model, even if in Excel format.

Does anyone have an idea who to connect with regarding keeping up-to-date with RBA changes?

Here's the entity and relationships diagram. I'm specifically interested in keeping up to date with the RBA. The RSA is a bonus but not essential as we've already chosen SAP solutions for many of the capabilities e.g. Ariba, S4, etc.

entry.title: New search box in Eclipse ADT not working properly
entry.content:
Hi guys,

This week, my Ecipse ABAP Developer Tools were updated and suddenly noticed that we have a new Search Box. Though there's a problem with it. See next:

If I put the cursor inside the search field and press "CTRL + V" my text is not pasted inside the Search field, but in the Code itself

Has anyone faced this with the new search box?

EDIT:

As a workaround, I have disabled the following option to get the old search popup back:

 

 

Regards.

entry.title: MaxDB restore failing
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

one data file of our prod. MaxDB has been zeroed. No idea how could that happen!
Now I am trying to restore, using DB Studio. I selected a point in time of today morning 7 AM.
This failed miserably, here are the errors from the log:

I wanted to attempt another restore to just restore the last Full DB Backup. We made it available in a local file system directly on the server. When I checked now, THE BACKUP FILE WAS GONE !!!! HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE ???

Could anyone please help with some meaningful explanations how can we manage the restore ? Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: Producer Keeps Crashing
entry.content:
Hi Sanchia,

It is possible that Producer is not crashing but that there is a slow running process.  The Watchdog window appears to inform the author that something is not responding so it might be an issue.  You can increase the time before Watchdog reports a potential issue if it is not really an issue but a slow running process.  What happens if you click Please wait?

If you do click Please wait several times and nothing occurs, I would start the investigation by confirming that the author that is having issues has the correct prerequisites to use Producer.  You can do that using the Enable Now Cloud Requirements document.  At a minimum, make sure that the following requirements are in place:

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge - SAP Community Escape House - UI5
entry.content: Me patiently waiting until February for the next room. 😭

entry.title: CDS view for Decision Text mentioned in the My Inbox while releasing the Sales Order
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

 

Could you please inform us the CDS view for the string field Decision Text that appears when a Sales Order is being released in the My Inbox app?

 

Best regards,

Customer


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: CDS view for Decision Text mentioned in the My Inbox...
entry.content:
Hello customer,

 

The CDS Database View is I_WorkflowTaskResultReasonText

The string content that is inside the "Decision Text" field code is WORKFLOWTASKRESULTREASON - WORKFLOWTASKRESULTREASONTEXT

However, this CDS View is still not released by SAP Developers, so you won't be able to use it yet.

 

We kindly suggest that you create a feature request for this business requirement.
This will inform our developers as to what additional functionality should be considered for future releases. You can check the following article for further reference 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product and follow the steps below.

 

1. Get started by opening SAP Customer Influence.

2. Register and accept the Terms of Use.

3. Choose a session of your interest.

4. Create and submit your improvement request.

5. Take a look at existing improvement requests and start voting and commenting.


When you go there, please request for the Release of the CDS View I_WorkflowTaskResultReasonText.

 

SAP Customer Influence enables customers to submit improvement requests and to openly vote on them. These voting results inform SAP of product enhancements and changes customers are most interested in seeing in future releases.


Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Checklist for Service Procurement Integration SAP Fieldglass, Ariba and S/4HANA Solutions
entry.content: Blog to to be posted soon

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud User and Team Provisioning SCIM API Best Practices and Sample Scripts
entry.content:
Hello @Matthew_Shaw,

I'll write again here. First of all, thank you very much for your support

I have analyzed your text multiple times and understood the following. Is this correct?

Authentication: Takes place in Azure AD. In Azure AD, there are currently two authentication methods: either with the email address or the UPN (which is also an email address). ???

Authorization: Takes place in SAC, based on the Subject Name Identifier (IAS). The user in SAC is authorized/found based on the Subject Name Identifier (from IAS). The user attributes in SAC (USER ID, email address, or a custom SAML attribute) must match the Subject Name Identifier. For example Subject Name Identifier (IAS) -> dpeck = USER ID (SAC) -> dpeck. And in SAC, the field USER ID under users must contain "dpeck". ???

This means that when I access a link to my SAC tenant, I can’t enter an Employee ID (e.g., “12344”) or USER ID (e.g., “dpeck”), but only an email address, as authentication takes place in Azure. Did I understand that correctly? However, authorization (Subject Name Identifier) can also take place using the Employee ID (e.g., “12344”). Did I understand that correctly?

Thank you very much

entry.title: Checklist for Service Procurement Integration SAP Fieldglass, Ariba and S/4HANA Solutions
entry.content:
Welcome to the Checklist for Service Procurement Integration SAP Fieldglass, Ariba and S/4HANA Solutions

Target Audience

This blog is for implementors and administrators from customer and partner organizations. It’s a living document that will be updated regularly, so bookmark this page and revisit for the latest insights. Got a question? Drop it in the Q&A section at the bottom of the page!

Why Service Procurement Integration Matters

Did you know that employees now make up only 58% of workforce spend? The other 42% goes to external resources. This data, from Services Procurement Insights: The Big Reveal, underscores the rising importance of managing external services efficiently.

In today’s business landscape, organizations come from diverse backgrounds and unique journeys. This heterogeneity can make service procurement integration challenging. But here’s the good news: streamlining your Purchase Requisition (PR), Purchase Order (PO), Service Entry Sheets (SES), and Invoice processes can give you tighter control over your procurement lifecycle.

Why is this critical? For one, you don’t want to fall victim to scams where fraudulent invoices got paid. Tight integration can help you avoid paying for services without authorized POs and verified proof of delivery. (funny but real story)

The Benefits of Integration

Integrating PR/PO, SES, and Invoice processes isn’t just about compliance; it’s about transformation. Here’s what you stand to gain:

  • Fraud Prevention: Never pay invoices without an authorized PO and proof of service delivery.
  • Enhanced Visibility: Get a complete picture of your service procurement spend.
  • Improved Compliance: Stay audit-ready and meet regulatory standards.
  • Streamlined Performance: Reduce inefficiencies and manual interventions.

Your Options for Integration

Here are three solid solutions for integrating end-to-end service procurement applications:

  1. ERP Add-on by ASAPIO
    • For customers on SAP ECC or S/HANA MM-SRV
  2. 22K Solution
    • For Customers who prefers direct integration between SAP Fieldglass and SAP S/4HANA (lean services)
  3. 4R2 Solution
    • For Customers who like to integrate SAP Fieldgalss and SAP S/4HANA(lean services) via SAP Ariba

Questions to Answer Before You Start

Before diving into implementation, take a moment to reflect on these key questions:

  1. What cost objects will your services spend be allocated to?
    • Think cost centers, internal orders, maintenance orders or projects. Clarifying this early will guide your financial postings.
  2. What version of SAP S/4HANA are you using?
    • Features and compatibility often hinge on your specific SAP S/4HANA version (MM-SRV vs lean services a key decision criteria).  For customers who are adopting SAP S/4HANA Cloud, they will automatically start only on lean services however many customers on-prem or private cloud may need to take care of this migration.  MM-SRV to lean services migration can be found here: Link: https://me.sap.com/notes/2906140
  3. Why can integration be complicated?
    • Integration complexity grows exponentially due to:
      • Types of cost objects
      • Business documents (PR, PO, SES, Invoice)
      • Actions like create, revise, or close
  4. What about performance considerations?
    • A major bottleneck can be the number of SES entries per single PO line item. Plan your system design to avoid performance issues.

Let’s Hear From You!

Have questions, thoughts, or tips to share? Drop them in the comments below, and let’s start a conversation!

entry.title: CDS view:get current year from date of one association and use it as condition in other association
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement to write a Query reporting that list out the Purchase requisition Workflow details with the combination of FM data (FMHIENODES and FMBASOBJNR).

I created one CDS view to have all PR details called _PRBase and other one to have all the FM data _FMData. _PRBase will go with item wise of Purchase requisition and the _FMData will go with Fiscal year wise FM data. So the WBS element of one PR item data will be having a multiple data in the FM (the same WBS element value will be stored to multiple Fiscal years).

Here the unique data or field as WBS element field value from _PRBase and the Measure field value from _FMData. This _FMData has multiple measure data based on Fiscal year. Therefore to avoid the duplicates , I have to add one more condition to filter the Year used in the creationdate of _PRBase with the Fiscal Year used in the _FMData.

How to achieve this in the calling association of the above two views? 

Please answer with the possible solutions to achieve this requirement.

Thanks.

entry.title: Release announcement of SAP Emarsys Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hello!

We are pleased to inform you about the release of our SAP Emarsys Stay Certified Assessment.

The SAP Emarsys Stay Certified, provides you the opportunity to familiarize yourself with the latest updates and product changes and keep your certification valid. The Stay Certified program contains 

  • SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement Stay Certified Learning - This course will help you learn about the recent enhancements in SAP Emarsys  to prepare for the assessment and stay certified.
  • An assessment which checks your knowledge on the latest features. 

Please Note:

1. Stay Certified is accessible only to those who have been Certified on SAP Emarsys. If you haven't obtained your certification, please so do here: https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-implementation-consultant-sap-emarsys-customer-engangement

2. You will  need S-User subscription to access Stay Certified as well as Certification.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: "Edit" button not available in FIORI App "Make Compan...
entry.content:
Hi

Please refer to following KBA note for the issue you reported, https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2764392

As per the note, you need check your assigned business role, e.g.SAP_BR_AA_ACCOUNTANT. Please Change the role SAP_BR_AA_ACCOUNTANT in the Business Roles app to allow Write access.

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Re: "Edit" button not available in FIORI App "Make Compan...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please also check the following Help Portal documentation for this, https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/8e71a76adeb84940b785936842cc7574.html

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content:
Looking at the configuration changes introduced in the following SAP Note, I am concerned about the manual updates specified for Table V_T596I for subapplication T424 and T425.  It only adds wage type /416 [CPP Second Contrib. ER] to box 27A [Employer's CPP2 contributions], but does not remove the association to Box 27 [Employer's CPP contributions].  Anyone else with this concern?

December 9, 2024

3550220

Legal Change

YE24: Form T4, T4A PDF layout and T4 XML update 2024

This leaves the reporting in the CRA Mag Media, causing the value to be 4055.50 rather than 3867.50, the max CPP.
<tot_empr_cpp_amt>4055.50</tot_empr_cpp_amt><tot_empr_cppe_amt>188.00</tot_empr_cppe_amt>

entry.title: Re: T4/T4A, and reconciliation reports for canada payroll

entry.title: Restricting applications and removing buttons
entry.content:
Hello,
I would like to inform you that the client is in PRD, and requires within its processes to apply restrictions to certain applications and functionalities within them.
-It is required that the Reiniciliation of compensated items app be added to a certain number of business users per area.
-In addition, it is required to restrict functionalities within some apps. In the "Reiniciliation of compensated items" app, they want to remove the "Reiniciliation" button for a certain number of business users.
Please provide your support to find out if this function is possible within the public version of the cloud. This option is important for the client.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Restricting applications and removing buttons
entry.content:
It's not possible to remove "Delete"/"Edit" button for some certain business users. I mean it's not possible to remove a button like "Delete", while remaining a button like "Edit"/"Create". 

Write access could be set to "No Access" in business roles, but it would disable the buttons "Delete" and "Edit" together. 

From the UI, you could also remove the buttons, but it's for all users who could access those apps.

entry.title: Four Clean Core Use Cases for SAP S/4HANA Cloud with SAP Business Technology Platform
entry.content:
Introduction

Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems have long been adapted to match companies' distinct business processes. However, as customizations accumulate, organizations are finding that maintaining their ERP functions becomes more complex, often slowing down innovation.  

In this short blog post, I’ll cover four use case examples with SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) you can adopt to simplify ERP upgrades with BTP extensions, while reducing testing time and effort. Customer examples are provided for each scenario, as well as links to technical implementation steps.

  1. Extend SAP S/4HANA processes without impacting core functionality
  2. Connect employees and partners to delight your customers
  3. Simplify process connectivity to any application
  4. Enhance SAP S/4HANA with planning and analysis

About the author

Terry Penner is part of the SAP BTP product marketing team, focused on BTP for SAP S/4HANA. He has more than 20 years of technical and business experience in the SAP platform and analytics, including working directly on hundreds of customer implementations.

Use case #1: Extend SAP S/4HANA processes without impacting core functionality

 

Innovative companies need to give their teams the tools to quickly turn great ideas into real-life changes. But for most businesses, it's still challenging to allow business users to create applications efficiently while maintaining IT governance standards.

Use SAP Build Apps so your SAP S/4HANA users can create extensions quickly without impacting core functionality.  Business users want to create specific workflows quickly without writing code, all while following IT company standards. For example, your team can design mobile and desktop applications and speed up development with prebuilt connectors and business content for SAP and third-party systems.

Freudenberg Group  adopted a low-code development strategy to 200 business users to help the company more quickly digitalize processes. This approach replaced manual paper document exchange, boosting new technology adoption fivefold. Now, the company is expanding this initiative to build a community inside Freudenberg for digital builder to solve key challenges and drive sustainable, value-driven growth.

>> Learn how to implement this use case

 

Use case #2: Connect employees and partners to delight your customers

The Lead to Cash process crosses multiple applications and connects employees and partners from initial interactions to order fulfillment. Real-time inventory levels and locations are vital, ensuring both sales reps and distribution partners have current data, especially when they may be competing for the same inventory.

Use pre-built integrations from SAP Integration Suite (part of SAP BTP) to connect SAP S/4HANA, finance and supply chain systems. As a result, your employees can boost business efficiency and provide a superior customer experience – all without requiring additional IT resources.

Vorwerk transformed the person-to-person sales experience by digitalizing the direct selling process. The world’s largest direct seller of premium household appliances used SAP Integration Suite and SAP BTP to connect back-end systems from SAP and third parties. This greatly reduced sales paperwork and significantly accelerated the sales cycle for their advisors.

>> Learn how to implement this use case

 

Use case #3: Simplify process connectivity to any application

Running a business on siloed legacy systems is no longer a competitive option.  A connected landscape is required to meet employee and customer expectations for simplified mobile access, omnichannel interactions, and collaborative engagement.

Open Connectors, a core component of SAP Integration Suite, offers over 160 prebuilt, feature-rich connectors to help ensure smooth connections with third-party SAP applications. The component helps create an integrated API layer and supports standards-based implementation for SAP and third-party applications, regardless of the back end. It facilitates critical digital capabilities, including mass-updating asset master data, generating purchase requisitions originating from a spreadsheet, and uploading manual entries automatically through an API.

Elkjøp is a prime example of a company leveraging this use case to build integrations with third-party applications. Using SAP Integration Suite, the consumer electronics retailer created an event driven architecture to connect services, repairs, installations, capacity handling and support tickets. The company processes 5 million messages daily to provide an experience where a customer can place an online order and pick it up in-store within 30 minutes.

>> Learn how to implement this use case

 

Use case #4: Enhance SAP S/4HANA with planning and analysis

Effective use of financial data safeguards your business from damaging risks, such as maverick spending, regulatory noncompliance, and reporting errors. But it also optimizes a finance organization's already limited time and energy.

By enabling native connectivity to SAP S/4HANA Cloud data from SAP Analytics Cloud, you can create a fully integrated foundation for aligning your operations and finance strategies. Business leaders can use financial planning and analysis to gain a real-time, business-wide understanding of critical business drivers to mitigate potential risks early, address planning variances proactively, and improve profitability. Company specific financial planning can be accomplished while still allowing for easier updating of SAP S/4HANA core modules.

Take Watco, a leading transportation and logistics provider in the United States. Watco brought together data from more than 200 different profit centers to provide a consolidated company view of financials. This allows the company to analyze different data sets to provide improved forecasting and a better link between financial planning and ERP. 

>> Learn how to implement this use case

 

Innovation without compromising ERP integrity

With SAP BTP together with SAP S/4HANA, it is possible to have the ERP experience that meets your business needs today, tomorrow, and in the future.  By applying these four use cases, you can help ensure the ERP system operates efficiently and supports the innovation of digital capabilities unique to your business. You can design custom applications, create connected experiences, simplify connectivity, and align operations and finances – all without compromising the integrity of your ERP investment.

For more use cases that can unleash your company’s potential, learn more about SAP Business Technology Platform with SAP S/4HANA.

 

Explore more related content in this series about SAP BTP with S/4HANA:

Overview

  • 2024 SAP BTP Year in Review: Release Highlights for SAP S/4HANA users

Artificial Intelligence

  • Artificial Intelligence (AI) for SAP S/4HANA and SAP BTP: A deep dive
  • How SAP Business AI and Large Language Models are shaping the future of SAP S/4HANA and SAP BTP 

Data Migration

  • SAP S/4HANA Data Migration and Master Data Management Best Practices with SAP BTP

Extensions

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensions with SAP Build Best Practices: An Expert Roundtable
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensions and Clean Core with SAP BTP - A Best Practices Conversation

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Build – Q4 2024 Edition
entry.content:

But looks SAP Help Documentation is not yet updated with RFC/BAPIs under Action Projects (Live APIs).

Please let me know if there is any other way to read the Documentation for Actions using RFC/BAPIs.

Thank you,

Venkat Vyza

entry.title: Re: 高级公司间销售和高级公司间库存转储 2208版本常见问题集锦
entry.content:
Dear expert,

上文提及高级公司间销售不支持MTO的业务场景， 这里是指对客户的销售订单也不支持按单的模式？

实际测试中对客户的销售订单是按照MTO, 但中转工厂的物料凭证无法产生，VCM提示需要维护E库存。请问在高级公司间销售流程中，是否支持对客户的订单是按照MTO的模式发货过账，而公司间的按照MTS的模式过账。

entry.title: Re: SAP_BASIS_CONFIG_OSS_COMM [New OSS: Create HTTPS Conn...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Error "NIECONN_REFUSED" is a pure network error that indicating the connection error from the configured system to SAP links. The router string should be wrongly used. Please verify with XX-SER-NET team for the correct router string for the system. After getting the correct router string, please create a new tasklist to see the result. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: 2502 C4C Release Discussion
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

When will this be published?

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: Jira Integration With SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Team,

How to Integrate SAP Cloud ALM with JIRA?

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Jira Integration With SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please follow the steps outlined in the SAP Community blog Integrate SAP Cloud ALM with JIRA.

Best regards，
Ellie

entry.title: What is the planned replacement for Configuration Validation in Cloud ALM?
entry.content:
What is the planned replacement for Solution Manager Configuration Validation, Dashboard Builder and the Security Optimization Service once Solution Manager is out of service.     
Will there be equivalent functionality offered in ALM once Solution Manager is out of service?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: What is the planned replacement for Configuration Val...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

In Cloud ALM, we have CSA(Configuration and Security Analysis) function instead of Configuration Validation in Solution Manager system.
"Transition to Configuration and Security Analysis in SAP Cloud ALM provides analysis and validation of configuration items like technical parameters, software versions and patch levels."
For more details, please refer to the information below. You can find more information about transition to SAP Cloud ALM as well.

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/transition-to-sap-cloud-alm.html
 

Best regards,

Haterm

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report help!
entry.content: try one thing at a time, you still have to test for the other conditions...

entry.title: Re: How to expose on-premise SAP B1 service layer with si...
entry.content: you can configure and use any ports for the external urls. in my example in the slide I used the port 443 for the Web client service and 8443 for the rest of the services. refer to the page 38 and 39 in the slide.

entry.title: Re: How to Install SSL Certificate for SAP B1 Web Browser...
entry.content:
Hello @hlak 

The ssl certificate cannot be installed to the IP address. 

Would you first go through my blog and session recordings to cover your topic?

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/best-practices-for-technical-...

For the step-by-step guide on how to implement this configuration, access the e-learning course on the SAP PartnerEdge portal (S-user required) :

  • Presentation
  • Step-by-step video


Regards
Eunseok

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory with respect to WM
entry.content:
Hi frenz,

How to create system inventory record for 200 bin in one time.. If I use t-code LI01N I need to copy paste  the bin from excel more times until 200...

Got any mass t-code for print count sheet..?!

entry.title: Set column width in CAP value help popup
entry.content:
I have a field in a CAP application which has a value help popup. I'm able to change certain things which appear in the value help popup using annotations, such as which fields are displayed, like this:

annotate service.CurrencyConversion with {
    fromCurrency
    @Common.ValueList: {
        Label : 'From Currency',
        CollectionPath : 'Currencies',
        Parameters : [
            {
                $Type : 'Common.ValueListParameterInOut',
                LocalDataProperty : 'fromCurrency_code',
                ValueListProperty : 'code',
            },
            {
                $Type : 'Common.ValueListParameterDisplayOnly',
                ValueListProperty : 'descr'
            }
        ],
    }
};

However, I have not been able to change the widths of the displayed columns. I would like to make them wider so that the column labels can be seen. 

A similar example can be seen in this learning Journey (Enriching Value Help with Dependent Filtering). My own example is similar to the screenshot below, where the first column is too narrow to see the entire column label. However, I have not found a way to increase the width of the column. Is anyone familiar with how to do this?

Through some searching I have found potential options, like using the annotation ![@HTML5.CssDefaults] : {width : '10rem'} (Setting the Default Column Width | SAP Help Portal), however this does not appear to work with value help tables. I also looked into setting the width in the manifest (Setting the Default Column Width - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK), however this also does not appear to be relevant for value help popup tables. Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Upgrade from BI 4.2 to BI 4.3 - Which Service Pack and patch should be used?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Currently on BI4.2 SP09 and want to upgrade to BI4.3. Not sure which Service Pack and patch we should upgrade to? We want to upgrade to Service pack which is stable and supports components like Webi, UDT, IDT and Crystal reports. Objective is to upgrade and have exiting components work as is. We don't plan to use new features. Upgrade is more to move to supported version. Any help on this would be much appreciated. 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: TRM payment reference in Transaction Manager
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: what's the difference between edit_mask and convexit in alv Field Catalog?
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm a new abap developer, I use alv to develop reports.

There are two ways to use the Conversion Exit:

1. Use edit_mask

 

edit_mask = '==ALPHA'

 

2. Use convexit

 

convexit = 'ALPHA'

 

What is the difference between the two?

If edit_mask can achieve the function, then isn't convexit redundant?

entry.title: Re: Fingerprints for SFTP Destinations in SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.1
entry.content:
@ted_ueda 

Do you know if this process works for Azure SFTP?  I am tring o deliver to an SFTP desination with BOBJ 4.3 and teh descriptions fingerprints look nothing like the "20 pair + colon" style.

Any help appreciated.

entry.title: Re: FY variant under DRC (bi-monthly reporting)
entry.content:
Hi MIlos,

For bi-monthly reporting period, you can use the fiscal year variant "BM". And as the reporting date should be 2 months after the reporting period, you can specify the offset as 2 months.

Hope this answers your query.

Thanks & Best Regards
Abhishek

entry.title: Print Slip Goods Receipt
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Is there any possibility to make tick automatically for print GR slip in SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

 Thank you!!!

#SAPS4HanaCLoudPublicEdition

#Procurement

entry.title: Open Brazil Localization Tax Settings J1BTAX for direct update Without Transport Requests
entry.content:
In standard SAP, Brazil's localization tax customization is handled through transaction code J1BTAX. This transaction provides a cluster of tables that manage data for various taxes such as IPI, ICMS, PIS, COFINS, ISS, and more. While these tables are transportable, they must be manually maintained in each SAP landscape due to differences in master data and condition table numbering settings. As a result, the SAP system should have the ability to allow tax changes specific to each environment without requiring transport requests.

To achieve this, follow the steps outlined below:

Step 1: Navigate to transaction code SE54 and enter the relevant table/view name.

Select ‘Generated Objects’ and then click ‘Create/Change’.

 

Step 2: Verify the selected radio button in the ‘Record Routine’ field.

If ‘Standard Recording Routine’ is selected, change it to ‘No, or User-Defined Record Routine’.

 

Now the table is open for direct modification.

Step 3: Repeat the steps 1 and 2 for all J1BTAX tables listed below:

Table

Description

J_1BTXDEF

Default Tax Rate Values

J_1BTXIP1

IPI Values

J_1BTXIP2

IPI Material-Dependent Exceptions

J_1BTXIP3

IPI Dynamic Exceptions

J_1BTXIC1

ICMS Values

J_1BTXIC2

ICMS Material-Dependent Ex

J_1BTXIC3

ICMS Dynamic Exceptions

J_1BTXCI1

ICMS-Complement Exceptions

J_1BTXST2

Sub Trib Values

J_1BTXST1

Sub Trib Material-Dependent Exceptions

J_1BTXST3

Sub Trib Dynamic Exceptions

J_1BTXISS

ISS Values

J_1BTXPIS

PIS Values

J_1BTXCOF

COFINS Values

J_1BTXWITH

Withholding Tax Rates and Assign Official Collection

J_1BATL1

Tax Law ICMS

J_1BATL2

Tax Law IPI

J_1BATL4

Tax Law COFINS

J_1BATL5

Tax Law PIS

Step 4: Add transaction code J1BTAX and all above relevant tables with Activity Key 02 (Change) to a separate business role. Assign this role only to specific user(s) who are authorized to make updates in the system.

Step 5: Test the change by accessing transaction code J1BTAX in the non-development system before transporting it to the target system.

 

 

********************************************End*********************************************

entry.title: Re: Updating J1BTAX in production
entry.content:
Dear All, 

I have posted a blog on SAP Community for the solution to this problem. Please check the link below: 

https://community.sap.com/t5/financial-management-q-a/open-brazil-localization-tax-settings-j1btax-for-direct-update-without/qaq-p/13991416

Thanks

Avnish

entry.title: Re: Error when creating Production Order
entry.content:
Hi,

Check if the Warehouse Code displayed in the application (B1 client) for the Item Code and on the backend (using MSSQL Studio or HANA Studio) are same or not. This looks to be some case (uppercase/lower case issue).

Also, have a look at the SAP Note 1410811. If unable to open the SAP Note, contact your partner. He would be able to using the Partner S-User ID and Password.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: How to use GOS attachment URL in CDS view
entry.content:
I wanna use URL itself in Datasphere.

Datasphere makes report including URL, therefore CDS View must include URLs as text.

(Create external document(PDF))

entry.title: Class and Characteristics in Material
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I would like to utilize the Classification in Product Master. Are there any documents that detail the complete process for setting up Material Class and Characteristics?

Additionally, is there a report available for Material Characteristics? For example, I would like to compare the sales revenue across different Characteristics or view a product list for each characteristic, and so on.

Thank you for your assistance!

entry.content: Table V_T549Z has been configured. Cumulation year has been changed based on suggestion but this still does not solved the issue.

entry.content: When i put the virtual element, it keeps erroring out and says keyword localized is expected

entry.title: SAP ABAP Uploading a package
entry.content:
Hey,
I wanted to ask you that is it possible to upload a package into a sap system. It like I created a package in one of the client system and in that package are all my programs, DDIC elements such as tables, structure, table type, Function Module etc. Now for another client I needed to create all the same things but with minor changes. So, I was hoping is there a way that I can download the package created in previous client and upload it new client, so I don't have to create all the objects again.  #SAP ABAP # ABAP

entry.title: Re: MaxDB restore failing
entry.content: restore failed -> disk_not_accessible, data file empty, backup file gone. => all this looks like there is file system issue, or do you have some anti-virus software, which may touch OS file? Maxdb software itself, won't delete file or make data file empty.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI problem create abap project
entry.content:
Hi 

Check this SAP Note 2498490

BR

SS

entry.title: Re: Anyone who have encountered the configuration of CRT...
entry.content: After V_T549Z changes been saved in a transport, has Time Evaluation and Payroll Calculation been executed in DEV ? I'll look at my notes tomorrow, but I'm running our of ideas (would have to look at your config).

entry.title: Re: SAC | Creating dynamic thresholds for the sac tables.
entry.content:
@himanshu_ts_sharma 

May be you should try defining thresholds not based on static numbers but rather another measure. This measure values can be tweaked by end user.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Issues when re-opening calibration session: Form not route to Calibration Step
entry.content:
Our performance period have a big problem when we reopen calibration session. More details:

- We set up a route map following step: Manager 1st Review Mid Year > Manager 1st Review Year End > Manager 2nd Review > Calibration > Dicussion > Employee Sign > Manager 1st Sign > Manager 2nd Sign

- We create a session include ~100 subject include, change rating and finalise it

- Next, some form was processed to Dicussuion, some is Employee Sign,..

- Next, we re-open session in Home > Calibration, we click to Re-open icon and message appear: ... and will route form to Calibration Step

The big issue is some of form after re-open session do not route to Calibration step(some form is move to step previous Calibration, some hold in current step)

I check some SAP knowledge, KBA are alose no limitation from here. So, Do you meet a same case in your company or your customer ?

entry.title: Re: Prorate based on Months not days
entry.content:
Hi Carsten,
what if I use duration calculation to calculate months and then apply price accordingly.
for example : from duration calculation I get the active duration of subscription, then I divide it by 12 (use case is of yearly billing cycle), then multiple the output by price.
this way I am applying price(prorate) based on months.
thanks,
Ankit

entry.title: Re: What you need to get and stay certified
entry.content: @Margit_Wagner, your first post was helpful because not many people would know to click the globe icon on the right to get started. My wife and I went in circles trying to find where to purchase one attempt for the exam (is that posted somewhere on the SAP website?). Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAC | Creating dynamic thresholds for the sac tables.
entry.content: Thanks nikhil, can you please suggest how to achieve the same. Also, will it work for the live data models.

entry.title: Re: MARC | MVKE tables not getting updated with MATERIAL_...

entry.title: Query Regarding Row Count of ECC Tables via DVM in SAP Solution Manager

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: RAP Business Events with Advanced Event Mesh [2]: Creating custom business events
entry.content:
Hi @TimoMaier 

I have created a custom event that needs to be triggered for sales order create. We need the custom event as we there are some Z fields that we need included in the payload. The event binding is done, and the topic is subscribed in the channel, but I do not see the event triggered. 

Below are some screenshots.

Is there any other config that needs to be done? The vent is not even triggered now.

Regards,

Smohan

entry.title: Re: SAC - Updata data loaded from local file
entry.content:
If you don't want to redo the mapping and wrangling, you can simply use 'Replace data source' option of import job in data management( of new model). 

Or you may also consider to use the new file upload widget to load data from local file in story directly. For more details, please refer to this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/new-end-user-file-upload-in-sap-analytics-cloud-qrc3-2024/ba-p/13780915

entry.title: Re: AZT_TM_adhoc Report deprecation date confirmation
entry.content: What do you mean by 'deprecation of Ad Hoc Report'? Would you please provide more details?

entry.title: Re: How to show a custom message in story while the table values load from live connection?
entry.content: Not so sure what is really need here. If it's live connection, tables and charts are always showing the latest data from source. All the visible data should be up to date.

entry.title: Re: Error when creating Production Order
entry.content: This error is also generating while doing the Goods Receipt Account

entry.title: While deleting the PO line item, Output status is in "to be output"
entry.content:
Here the issue they are facing is, while creating a PO and during saving the PO the output (BRF+) is getting completed. Then while making any changes (for eg: quantity change), the output is getting completed while saving. But when they try to delete the PO line item and save it, the output is in the "To be output" status.

Please find the attachments for output screen. Please help me analyze the issue.

entry.title: Re: Issue calling remote odata service (via approuter) from trial version of abap environment on SCP
entry.content: Hi, What was the issue here? Were you able to resolve this?

entry.title: Re: Intent-based Navigation - semanticObjectAction annotation
entry.content: Can you maybe pass the xml annotation sample that shows how this Identification annotation is linked to the "QuickViewFacets" annotation? Thx!

entry.title: Re: Universal Allocation on the basis of revenue
entry.content:
Regarding the 'No receiver found' error when running allocation cycle, it's always suggested you to check whether there are postings exist for the combination of receiver.

For example, in your scenario, if you are using margin analysis type allocation, you can check whether there are posting data exist via 'Market Segments - Actuals'. And also take a look at the posting period, sometimes, there are no posting data for allocation cycle run period and cause the error.
